Localization.Description: Actions with categories of graphical objects

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User "{subject.account.name}" deleted category of graphical objects "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" created category of graphical objects "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" changed category of graphical objects "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
